_note: Permissions and hooks here are tuned for this docs-only governance repository. Adapt for code repos: narrow the markdownlint hook to changed files only, add git push only if your workflow requires auto-push, and review the deny list against your team's branching workflow. The markdownlint hook below calls scripts/run-markdownlint.sh so Bash/WSL environments can fall back to node.exe when the npm shim cannot find node. For code repositories, see .claude/hooks/hooks.json for additional governance-enforcing hooks (secret scan, config-protection, --no-verify block) — copy the relevant entries from that file into your project's settings.json under the 'hooks' key. A session-stop handoff reminder is also documented in that file under _optional_examples but is not part of the default hook set; see the note there before enabling it.
